name: Nera – Spending Limit
author: Nera
upgrade_notice: Refinements to the account-page UI and checkout confirmation dialog.

sections.description: Per-customer voluntary spending limits for WooCommerce (daily/weekly/monthly/yearly/custom), with TeraWallet awareness. Admins enable and configure the feature under Theme Settings → Nera Features → Spend Limit; customers set their own limit on the Account Details page; the limit is surfaced and enforced at checkout.
sections.installation: Install and activate the plugin, then enable the feature under Theme Settings → Nera Features → Spend Limit.
